title: — Synopsis
text:
Renew certificates for a Kubernetes cluster
kubeadm certs renew [flags]

-h, --help
help for renew
help for renew

--rootfs string
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
